package_salary.ppo_ctc: During 6 months of internship stipend will be - 40K per/month + 2700 Sodexo food coupon After that pay package will be - 6.15 LPA + 2L Joining bonus (1st yr only) + 32400 food coupons + other company benefits (Medical, Gratuity etc.)
package_salary.bond: Applicable after completion of internship If any student decides to leave within less than a year from the joining date (FTE) then he has to pay full refund of the joining bonus and if post 1 year completion and before 2 years completion, any student decides to leave then he has to pay back 50% of the joining bonus
